description_long: This urban lounge structure features a rectangular frame with a slatted wooden roof supported by a series of angled wooden beams, creating a visually dynamic and open design. The base consists of a flat concrete or stone platform, with integrated bench seating running along both long sides, supported by black metal frames. The benches are simple and linear, with no visible cushions or upholstery, and the open sides allow for easy access and airflow. The angled beams provide both structural support and a sense of enclosure without fully enclosing the space, making it suitable for outdoor relaxation or social gatherings. The overall aesthetic is modern and minimalist, with a focus on geometric lines and contrasting materials. The structure is large enough to accommodate multiple people and is intended for communal use in parks, plazas, or other public urban environments.
description: A modern, open-air lounge structure with a slatted wooden roof, angled wooden supports, and integrated bench seating on a concrete base. The design is minimalist and suitable for outdoor urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the lounge, the slatted roof, angled wooden supports, and both benches clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the structure, the linear arrangement of the benches, and the open slatted roof.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same arrangement of angled supports and benches visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, emphasizing the open framework and the alignment of the wooden beams and benches.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions present; benches are solid and unupholstered.
attribute_backrest_design: No backrest; benches are flat and open with no vertical support.
attribute_armrest_presence: Absent; no armrests are present on the benches.
attribute_leg_style: Bench supports are straight, made of black metal, and integrated into the frame; angled wooden beams serve as structural legs for the roof.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: No upholstery; surfaces are solid wood and metal with a smooth, matte finish.
